name: Realm of Cubes
short_description: Realm Of Cubes is a voxel-based action adventure RPG. It takes place in a handcrafted voxel fantasy world! Go quest, Level up, and get loot!
detailed_description:
What is Realm Of Cubes?
Realm Of Cubes is a Voxel-based Action Adventure RPG. It takes place in a fantasy world that is in need of help from you, the adventurer. You can experience the world by yourself, or with a friend!
What features are in the game?
◽Do Quest!
◽Level Up!
◽Choose between seven classes: Mage, Paladin, Ranger, Rogue, Warrior, Deathknight, Shaman.
◽Explore a hand crafted fantasy world inspired by World of Warcraft and Cube World.
◽Action based combat with aiming/strafing.
◽Different mounts and achievments to collect!
◽Lots of companion pets to find!
◽Hang gliding!
◽Help out the residents by completing quest and defeating monsters around the world!
◽Unique talent trees for each class.
◽Level progression up to level 60.
◽Play single player or with a friend with couch co-op!
◽Lots of unique spell abilities for each class!
◽Multiple professions: Bartending, Cooking, Smelting, Tailoring, Alchemy, Camping, Blacksmithing, Fishing, Mining, and Gardening!



However, be careful, if you start the game with a controller. Steam tries to map the keyboard and mouse to a controller and it's supposed to be played with a keyboard and mouse. If you would like to play it with couch co-op here's a guide I'm linking below.
